subcodes.first_line: O scion of the glorious martyr! Two letters from Paris arrived from you. The first was lost among papers, despite [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل شهید جلیل دو نامه از پاریس از شما رسید اول در اوراق غرق شد با وجود
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @wisdom [hikmat], @veiling [hijab], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers
